center.name: 泰米尔纳德邦
center.summary: 泰米尔纳德邦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括斑头雁、鳞喉啄木鸟、Ashambu laughingthrush等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Western Ghats in southern Kerala and southern Tamil Nadu

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is restricted south of the Palghat Gap with the main distribution range in the higher regions (above ) of the Palani Hills extending into the Annamalai Hills in western Tamil Nadu and Munnar in Kerala

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |date=2000 |title=Tracking the spring migration of a bar-headed goose (Anser indicus) across the Himalaya with satellite telemetry |url=https://www.airies.or.jp/attach.php/6a6f75726e616c5f30342d32656e67/save/0/0/04_2-08.pdf |journal=Global Environmental Research |volume=4 |issue=2 |pages=195–205}} The bar-headed goose migrates over the Himalayas to spend the winter in parts of South Asia, from Assam to as far south as Tamil Nadu.{{cite journal |last1=Takekawa |first1=J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found mainly in open dry scrub forest and cultivated areas. It is not found in the eastern dry zone of Tamil Nadu; however, an exhausted specimen has been observed in Pondicherry

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The streak-throated woodpecker (Picus xanthopygaeus) is a species of woodpecker found in the Indian subcontinent
